ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "shop_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Code of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "pos_no" INTEGER /* Number of the POS terminal where the transaction occurred */,
  "bask_code" INTEGER /* Code of the basket or transaction */,
  "bask_spend" REAL /* Amount spent in the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount including tax and discounts */,
  "is_return" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is a return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for return if applicable */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_code") REFERENCES stores ("store_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_pos_no FOREIGN KEY ("pos_no") REFERENCES pos_terminals ("pos_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_code" TEXT /* Code of the store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_closing_date" TEXT /* Date the store closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store */,
  "store_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store's location */,
  "store_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pos_terminals" (
  "pos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each POS terminal */,
  "pos_no" INTEGER /* Number of the POS terminal */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the POS terminal is located */,
  "terminal_type" TEXT /* Type of POS terminal (e.g., cash, credit) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the POS terminal was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the POS terminal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pos_terminals_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item in stock */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the inventory item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level is low */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Last date the item was reordered */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Estimated next reorder date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movement" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item being moved */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., in, out) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item being moved */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the movement */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee responsible for the movement */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the movement occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movement_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movement_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movement_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions_customers" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id", "customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions_inventory" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item being sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, sales) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is linked to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "user_id")
)
